docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,753.00 FILED BY COREA, WALDA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEW, JEREMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COREA, WALDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO FEE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-13-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEW, JEREMY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF WALDA COREA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS WESLEY COREA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEREMY CHEW (CORRECT SPELLING) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 4/18/22. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO WALDA COREA-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF COREA, WALDA
DECLARATION CORRECTION OF NAME AND ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEW, JEREMY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2022 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COREA, WALDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEW, JEREMY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
